narrative.description: Dota 2 is a team-based MOBA where two five-player teams destroy the enemy Ancient by pushing lanes, farming gold, and coordinating hero abilities.
narrative.core_loop: Select a hero, last-hit creeps for gold and experience, buy items, coordinate team fights and objectives, and push lanes to destroy enemy structures.

mechanics.map_notes: In Dota 2, teams push minion waves along lanes toward enemy structures.
mechanics.expression: In Dota 2, teams push minion waves along lanes toward enemy structures.

mechanics.map_notes: In Dota 2, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In Dota 2, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: In Dota 2, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.
mechanics.expression: In Dota 2, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.

mechanics.map_notes: In Dota 2, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.expression: In Dota 2, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.map_notes: In Dota 2, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Dota 2, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Dota 2 through its core moba loop.
